cli-terminal.name: CLI Terminal
cli-terminal.description: Live animated terminal showing the installation flow. Drop it in your docs.

changelog.name: Changelog
changelog.description: Accordion-style versioned release list with smooth GSAP height animation.

burst-button.name: Burst Button
burst-button.description: Seeds physically burst from the click point with GSAP staggered physics.

ripple-button.name: Ripple Button
ripple-button.description: Click-origin radial ripple expands from the exact cursor position.

magnetic-nav.name: Magnetic Nav
magnetic-nav.description: Nav links magnetically attract the cursor; elastic spring snaps back on leave.

step-trail.name: Step Trail
step-trail.description: Animated step breadcrumb with GSAP-driven progress bar between stages.

peel-card.name: Peel Card
peel-card.description: Card front retracts on hover revealing vibrant content underneath.

flip-card.name: Flip Card
flip-card.description: 3D rotateY flip using CSS preserve-3d and GSAP for precise control.

holo-ticket.name: Holo Ticket
holo-ticket.description: Premium holographic ticket component with 3D pointer-tracking reflection, dynamic CSS clipping, and elastic tearing physics.

grow-input.name: Grow Input
grow-input.description: SVG stroke dashoffset vine grows along the bottom border on focus.

tag-input.name: Tag Input
tag-input.description: Animated tag management — press Enter or comma to add, backspace to remove.

particle-field.name: Particle Field
particle-field.description: R3F particle cloud in melon palette colors reacting to mouse movement.

floating-orbs.name: Floating Orbs
floating-orbs.description: Sinusoidal floating spheres with dynamic colored point lighting.

blob-cursor.name: Blob Cursor
blob-cursor.description: Velocity-based squash and stretch blob with elastic trailing ring.

crosshair.name: Crosshair
crosshair.description: Precision crosshair with live coordinate readout and a grid overlay.

char-reveal.name: Char Reveal
char-reveal.description: Characters blur-in with stagger tied to ScrollTrigger scroll position.

parallax-strips.name: Parallax Strips
parallax-strips.description: Depth strips that scroll at different speeds creating a parallax illusion.

drip-text.name: Drip Text
drip-text.description: Letters drip down on hover with random skew offsets, spring back on leave.

scramble-text.name: Scramble Text
scramble-text.description: Characters cycle through random glyphs before resolving back on hover.

stripe-wipe.name: Stripe Wipe
stripe-wipe.description: A colored stripe sweeps across the viewport to mask route changes.

morph-transition.name: Morph Transition
morph-transition.description: Circular clip expands from center masking the page swap between routes.

solar-carousel.name: Solar Carousel
solar-carousel.description: 3D orbital carousel where cards rotate in a physical orbit around an interactive central gravity core with inertial drag.

kinetic-magnet.name: Kinetic Magnet
kinetic-magnet.description: A mechanical grid of interactive SVG lines/needles that act as magnetic nodes pointing directly at your cursor, emitting elastic spring waves on clicks.

signal-loom.name: Signal Loom
signal-loom.description: A transparent pointer-reactive glass command surface where luminous workflow threads bend toward the cursor and layered inspection wafers morph into focus.

chromatic-melt-text.name: Chromatic Melt Text
chromatic-melt-text.description: A transparent chromatic wordmark with offset glass shadows, soft pointer glow, and restrained per-letter hover lift.

rind-scanner-text.name: Rind Reveal Text
rind-scanner-text.description: A transparent pointer-light wordmark that reveals a primary/secondary color pass inside readable chunky type.

sticker-stack-text.name: Sticker Stack Text
sticker-stack-text.description: Transparent layered sticker-style type cards that fan open with springy Gen-Z poster energy and bold MelonUI color blocking.

glyph-orbit-text.name: Glyph Orbit Text
glyph-orbit-text.description: A transparent central headline surrounded by orbiting character tiles derived from the same word, forming a readable typographic halo.

seedwave-text.name: Seedwave Text
seedwave-text.description: Transparent click-born particle typography that compresses the headline and throws melon-colored seed sparks from the exact press point.

sticker-wall.name: Sticker Wall
sticker-wall.description: Interactive Gen-Z editorial sticker grid that fans out, scales, and tilts dynamically on pointer hover.

luminous-waves.name: Luminous Waves
luminous-waves.description: Canvas-based glowing sine wave threads running horizontally and bending dynamically to track cursor position.

retro-grid.name: Retro Grid
retro-grid.description: A neon 3D perspective grid extending to the horizon that moves forward and tilts on cursor coordinates.

noise-blob.name: Noise Blob
noise-blob.description: Organic liquid morphing blobs using SVG color matrix and blur filters to create a gooey lava lamp visual.

matrix-rain.name: Matrix Rain
matrix-rain.description: Digital cascading streams of custom alphanumeric glyphs and seeds in neon-green and coral-red.

morphing-cyber-node.name: Morphing Cyber Node
morphing-cyber-node.description: A multi-state, fluid-morphing interactive widget with magnetic hover physics and dynamic glassmorphism.

orbital-command-ring.name: Orbital Command Ring
orbital-command-ring.description: A futuristic radial page navigation menu summoned by dragging with elastic joystick physics, custom target paths, and cinematic flashes.

kinetic-glass-grid.name: Kinetic Glass Grid
kinetic-glass-grid.description: A physical, reactive glass grid that elevates and glows intelligently based on cursor proximity, using complex distance-based spring physics.

glitch-pulse-core.name: Glitch Pulse Core
glitch-pulse-core.description: A highly interactive cybernetic core utilizing Framer Motion for magnetic hover physics, states (STABLE, UNSTABLE, CRITICAL) and SVG-based escalating glitch effects.

magnetic-particle-field.name: Magnetic Particle Field
magnetic-particle-field.description: Background particles dynamically attract toward cursor and components in a verlet physics R3F instance field.

retro-crt-background.name: Retro CRT Scan Universe
retro-crt-background.description: A nostalgic cyber-terminal background featuring scanlines, phosphor glow, typing effect, and screen flicker.

sticker-collage-wall.name: Sticker Collage Noise Wall
sticker-collage-wall.description: A Gen-Z chaotic scrapbook aesthetic with draggable torn paper stickers and reactive physics.

hypermorph-bento.name: HyperMorph Bento
hypermorph-bento.description: A highly dynamic 2x2 grid of layout items expanding to flex columns/rows with spring animations.

quantum-lens-decoder.name: Quantum Lens Decoder
quantum-lens-decoder.description: An interactive code-breaking surface revealing clear text through a cursor-tracking lens.

elastic-tether-hub.name: Elastic Tether Hub
elastic-tether-hub.description: A centralized command core that blooms draggable action nodes on click, featuring elastic spring physics, real-time distance tracking, and a dramatic pull-to-fire release mechanic.

fluid-magnetic-dial.name: Fluid Magnetic Dial
fluid-magnetic-dial.description: A highly interactive, fluid-like control dial featuring magnetic Framer Motion physics, gooey SVG filters, and dynamic glitching text.

synapse-terminal.name: Synapse Terminal
synapse-terminal.description: A Gen-Z premium interactive graph node UI with animated bezier tethers, glassmorphic floating elements, and a reactive custom cursor.

anti-gravity-bento.name: Anti-Gravity Bento
anti-gravity-bento.description: A premium glassmorphic bento grid where items float into zero-gravity on hover.

infinity-mirror-card.name: Infinity Mirror
infinity-mirror-card.description: Deep nested 3D card creating an optical illusion of infinite layers, reacting to magnetic mouse movement.

chromatic-slice-card.name: Chromatic Slice Card
chromatic-slice-card.description: A Gen-Z premium card that dynamically slices into floating horizontal strips in 3D space on hover, revealing a neon core.

kinetic-shard-terminal.name: Kinetic Shard Terminal
kinetic-shard-terminal.description: A highly interactive cyberpunk-style terminal that unlocks via dragging and dropping a

kinetic-shatter-card.name: Kinetic Shatter Card
kinetic-shatter-card.description: A premium glassmorphic enclosure that violently shatters into 3D floating shards on hover, revealing a cybernetic glowing core inside.

liquid-dimensional-nav.name: Liquid Dimensional Nav
liquid-dimensional-nav.description: A highly interactive sidebar component combining liquid morphing, dimensional 3D peeling, and magnetic physics-based hovering.

nexus-prompt-core.name: Nexus Prompt Core
nexus-prompt-core.description: A fluidly morphing AI prompt interface that transitions from a sleek input pill to a glowing processing core, and finally unfolds into a premium glassmorphic response dashboard.

prism-vault.name: Prism Vault
prism-vault.description: A 3D cryptographic data vault that unspools into a responsive bento dashboard using fluid layout morphing.

terminal-cursor.name: Terminal Cursor
terminal-cursor.description: A precision spring-velocity cursor containing crosshair ticks and vector neon glow.
